title: Bolsius True Joy Aroma Diffuser with 8 Sticks - Secret Forest Fragrance - with Natural Extracts - Duration: up to 10 Weeks - Air Fresheners - No Alcohol - 80ml
features: The sales package contains 1 80ml diffuser and 8 fragrance diffuser sticks (one shaped snowflake)
Warm and woody fragrance that lasts up to 10 weeks
Made in EU. Made without alcohol and with natural extracts, with love for people and the planet

Since 1870, Bolsius has been producing quality products to create coziness and a warm atmosphere in your home. We do this with passion, craft skill and love for people and the planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candle light and fragrances that tickle the senses. This is how you can make every moment special. For you and everyone around you.
description: Product Description Bolsius True Joy high quality scented sticks contained in an elegant ceramic bottle. A collection that spreads pure joy. With natural, alcohol-free extracts, the True Joy collection combines the beauty of nature through its colors, shapes and scents. Enjoy the scents of nature at home with True Joy fragrances Directions Add water to the diffuser up to the 'MAX' line. Insert 2-3 fragrance sticks into the water. Turn on the device and enjoy the fragrance. Replace the fragrance sticks when the scent fades. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
